case_title: SPANIER, VINCENT J. vs. ERIC W. SCHOLZ IND/DBA LAW OFF. OF ERIC W. SCHOLZ

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPANIER, VINCENT J. AS TO DEFENDANT ERIC W. SCHOLZ IND/DBA LAW OFF. OF ERIC W. SCHOLZ
